final_prompt.prompt:
Create an infographic illustration showing a detailed exploded-view breakdown of a Sony A7 camera with all parts labeled.

Style/medium: technical illustration, exploded-view diagram, clean vector style with subtle shading, product manual aesthetic
Composition: centered exploded-view arrangement, parts radiating outward from center in logical disassembly order, isometric perspective
Subject: Sony A7 mirrorless camera, showing all internal and external components including sensor, shutter mechanism, lens mount, EVF, rear LCD, battery compartment, circuit boards, buttons, dials, and screws
Scene/backdrop: clean white or light gray gradient background, minimal to keep focus on technical details
Lighting/mood: soft even studio lighting, no harsh shadows, professional technical documentation feel
Color palette: Sony A7 body in matte black, metallic silver accents for internal parts, color-coded component groups for clarity
Materials/textures: matte black magnesium alloy body, metallic circuit boards, glass sensor cover, rubber grip texture
Text (verbatim): "Sony A7"
Constraints: all major components must be clearly separated and labeled with lines pointing to each part; labels should use Spanish terminology as implied by the query language
Avoid: photorealistic rendering, 3D render noise, cluttered overlapping parts, missing labels, generic camera silhouette without detail
